short_text: Shakib to Ackermann, Tom Cooper Run Out!! Two run-outs within a span of three deliveries. This is harakiri of the highes
full_text: Shakib to Ackermann, Tom Cooper Run Out!! Two run-outs within a span of three deliveries. This is harakiri of the highest order. Was punched through the off-side by Ackermann and it was a fine sliding stop by the fielder at cover. Fires in a throw at the keeper's end after a quick recovery, and Cooper who was charging at the keeper's end, is short of his crease despite putting in a dive. Bangladesh on top as Netherlands have been reduced to 15/4. 2 runs completed.

full_text: Shakib to Max ODowd, Max ODowd Run Out!! Oh no! Things go from bad to worse for Netherlands. And Max ODowd looks livid, lets out his frustration with a loud roar. The throw at the bowler's end was a flat one, and Shakib takes off the bails before Max ODowd can get back in. 1 run completed

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Bas de Leede, Caught by Nurul Hasan!! Make that two in two! Taskin Ahmed has gotten Bangladesh off to a
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Bas de Leede, Caught by Nurul Hasan!! Make that two in two! Taskin Ahmed has gotten Bangladesh off to a fantastic start. Short and quick outside off, and Bas de Leede pokes away from his body. Another regulation nick and the keeper doesn't miss out on the opportunity. "Dream start for Bangladesh," quips Athar Ali Khan on air. Taskin's on a hat-trick...

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Vikramjit Singh, Caught by Yasir Ali!! And Taskin Ahmed strikes on the very first ball. That's a golden
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Vikramjit Singh, Caught by Yasir Ali!! And Taskin Ahmed strikes on the very first ball. That's a golden duck for Vikramjit Singh. Angles this length ball away from the left-hander and he tries to play away from his body. A thick outside edge is induced and the fielder at slip takes a sharp catch, inches above the ground. Enough fingers under the ball, and the third umpire after watching a few replays is convinced that it's a clean catch. Just the kind of start Bangladesh were looking for.
